versions.installHtml: # k0rdent includes the template for Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service out of the box
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get clustertemplate -n kcm-system
# NAME                            VALID
# aws-eks-0-1-0                   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: aws-eks-example
  namespace: kcm-system
  labels:
    type: aws
    group: demo
spec:
  template: aws-eks-0-1-0
  credential: aws-credential
  config:
    region: eu-central-1
    controlPlane:
      instanceType: t3.small
      rootVolumeSize: 32
    worker:
      instanceType: t3.medium
      rootVolumeSize: 32
